channel.title: Disabling the change of scroll position on frontity <Link> component click
channel.description:
Hi there,
I'm working on a Frontity project and i've made a cool page transition with react-spring, the only problem is when the Frontity link component is clicked, it automatically scrolls to the top of the page.
I wan't to disable this feature, does anyone know how i could do this?

item.title: Disabling the change of scroll position on frontity <Link> component click
item.dc:creator: erwin
item.description:
Hi there,

I’m working on a Frontity project and i’ve made a cool page transition with react-spring, the only problem is when the Frontity link component is clicked, it automatically scrolls to the top of the page.

I wan’t to disable this feature, does anyone know how i could do this?

Read full topic
item.source: Disabling the change of scroll position on frontity <Link> component click
